testcase.name: tests.test_api
testcase.error: tests/test_api.py:7: in <module> from git_pw import api git_pw/api.py:25: in <module> class HTTPTokenAuth(treq.auth.AuthBase): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq.auth' has no attribute 'AuthBase'

testcase.error: tests/test_bundle.py:6: in <module> from git_pw import bundle git_pw/bundle.py:11: in <module> from git_pw import api git_pw/api.py:25: in <module> class HTTPTokenAuth(treq.auth.AuthBase): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq.auth' has no attribute 'AuthBase'
